sentences.english: I hate winter because it gets dark at four PM and it's depressing.
Typhoon season in my country is scary, and we had a really bad one last year that flooded the streets.
sentences.korean: 우리나라의 태풍 시즌은 무서워요. 작년에 정말 심한 게 있었고 거리가 침수됐어요.

sentences.english: I actually love storms, watching lightning from my window is one of my favorite things.
sentences.korean: 사실 폭풍을 좋아해요. 창문에서 번개를 보는 건 가장 좋아하는 것 중 하나예요.
